oid4vci-issuer.target: Marty's public credential-issuer URL through the gateway

oid4vp-verifier.target: Marty's public verifier URL through the gateway
oid4vp-verifier.reason: Enable only after the production-like flow-start command and the official runner adapter pass every module.

oid4vp-haip-verifier.target: Marty's public verifier URL through the gateway
oid4vp-haip-verifier.reason: Enable only after signed request URIs, x509_hash, per-request encryption keys, and encrypted direct_post.jwt are implemented and verified.

certification.reason: Certification execution is deferred until funding is approved. It uses this same pinned runner, profile configuration, production image digests, and exported evidence.
